title: AI Assistant
subtitle: Chat, search, analytics and advisors — grounded in your campus data

workspace.title: AI Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Select a campus, then chat, search, analyse and get proposals for it.
workspace.emptyHint: The assistant is grounded in one campus at a time: its documents, its figures, its AI plan. Choose the campus you want to work on.
workspace.campusCount: {count, plural, one {# active campus} other {# active campuses}}

citations.title: {count, plural, one {# verified source} other {# verified sources}}

chat.emptyHint: Ask a question about your documents, students, schedules or procedures. The assistant answers in your language and cites its sources.

search.title: Semantic search
search.subtitle: Search the campus document library by meaning, not just keywords.
search.hint: Enter a query to search your authorized documents by meaning.

analytics.title: AI-assisted analytics
analytics.subtitle: The AI narrates verified ERP figures — it never computes or invents them.

advisors.title: Business advisors
advisors.subtitle: Deterministic proposals over your ERP data — you decide and act.
advisors.noProposalsHint: The advisor found no actionable signal in the current data.
advisors.disclaimer: Advisors propose; they never modify ERP data. Every action opens a permission-gated screen where your own access applies.

AI_DISABLED.title: AI is not available
AI_DISABLED.description: The AI service is not configured on this platform. Contact your administrator to enable it.

AI_NOT_ENABLED.title: AI is not enabled for this campus
AI_NOT_ENABLED.description: This campus has no active AI subscription. Ask your administrator to enable an AI plan.

AI_FEATURE_NOT_IN_PLAN.title: Not included in your plan
AI_FEATURE_NOT_IN_PLAN.description: This capability requires a higher AI plan. Ask your administrator to upgrade the campus plan.

errors.AI_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: The monthly AI token budget for this campus is exhausted.
errors.UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT: The AI service timed out. Please try again.
errors.NETWORK: Network error — could not reach the AI service.
errors.STREAM: The response stream was interrupted. Please try again.
errors.HTTP_ERROR: The AI service returned an error. Please try again.
errors.INTERNAL: Something went wrong. Please try again.
